morning.title: Sakana AI launches Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system
morning.summary: Sakana AI launches Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system with a single model API, claiming it matches Fable and Mythos on benchmarks.

morning.title: Vimeo owner Bending Spoons seeks to raise ~$1.62B in a US IPO
morning.summary: Vimeo owner Bending Spoons seeks to raise ~$1.62B in a US IPO, selling 58M shares at $26 to $28 apiece, at a valuation of $19B.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquires Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: No Claude Fable 5? No problem: Sakana achieves frontier performance with new Fugu multi-model, auto synthesis system
morning.summary: Sakana achieves frontier performance with its new Fugu multi-model, auto synthesis system, rivaling Claude Fable 5.

morning.title: A new unpatchable flaw in Apple chips opens the door to an iPhone jailbreak
morning.summary: A new unpatchable flaw in Apple chips could allow for an iPhone jailbreak, posing a significant security risk.

morning.title: OpenAI Launches Full-Scale Effort to Patch Open-Source Bugs as It Takes on Anthropic’s Mythos
morning.summary: OpenAI launches a full-scale effort to patch open-source bugs, taking on Anthropic's Mythos in the process.

morning.title: Valve Steam Machine review: much smaller than PS5, surprisingly smooth, and navigable with any modern gamepad
morning.summary: The Valve Steam Machine is smaller than the PS5, smooth, and navigable with any modern gamepad, but very expensive and requires manual configuration.

morning.title: Tata Electronics, a major tech supplier to Apple and Tesla, confirms data breach
morning.summary: Tata Electronics, a major tech supplier to Apple and Tesla, confirms a data breach, highlighting the vulnerability of supply chains.

morning.title: Researchers introduce Self-Harness, a framework that lets AI agents rewrite their own rules, boosting performance up to 60%
morning.summary: Researchers introduce Self-Harness, a framework that allows AI agents to rewrite their own rules, potentially boosting performance by up to 60%.

morning.title: The inevitable weakness of metrics
morning.summary: The inevitable weakness of metrics is discussed in a book review, highlighting the limitations and potential pitfalls of relying on metrics.

gym.summary: A guide to repurposing an old Mac or PC as a home cloud, which can be done in under 20 minutes.

gym.summary: An accountant explains how people may be richer than they think, highlighting potential areas of untapped wealth.
